task: Convert the embedded noisy operational evidence packet into a defensible, reproducible feasibility analysis and lift-plan memo for a constrained crane pick window. Use only the embedded packet (R1..R4, threshold, remediation budget, remediation options and costs) and the provided scoring rule. Produce a reproducible workbook or script (crane_pick_feasibility.xlsx and/or an executable script embedded or linked in the workbook) and a concise expert memo (lift_plan_note.md). Document every assumption, include row-level citations to the embedded packet, show intermediate calculations and validation checks, report sensitivity analyses (noting any record that changes classification with a +/-5% sensitivity), and provide a final decision table indicating pass/warn/fail and any recommended, budget-feasible remediation combination. Do not invent inputs or use external data; mark unresolved ambiguities as needs_review and flag for expert signoff when rules require it.
